reviews.review_description: This is a collection of mini-games that involves shooting with a gun. Most of them are very fun and polished. The graphics are great. Good for quick sessions.

Was happy to to see protube support..it doesn't work in some of the mini games tho..will it be implemented in them mini games too?

Edit..works perfectly now...smoother too..excellent game for provolver

It's a brilliant game ..really fun..especially for point blank fans..this is 1 of the best with great support from dev

reviews.review_title: For Point Blank fans. And everyone else.
reviews.review_description:
Like so many people, I've been waiting on VR Point Blank forever. And, yes, I've got the other game in dev too. But this one is better right now. Instead of mimicking PB, it pushes the template forward with some atmospheric environments and clever touches.

It's intuitive for new VR users, but gets very tough for the veterans. And I want the devs to make even more levels, so support them and buy it!

reviews.review_title: Issue I had with IAPS have fixed.
reviews.review_description:
UPDATED REVIEW 15.12.24. 
I’d pretty much given up on this game ever working again but low and behold the devs have updated it and it I have my IAPs back. Thank you. 

A little bugs I’ve noticed so far. In the sheep level, the ones you are not supposed to kill appeared once for me, then briefly appeared at the start and vanished like ghosts. Months too late for that lol! It happened a number of times in a run and no matter what I do i continue to have that issue.

Otherwise, it’s been over six months, but I think it looks better and the UI has improved  too. Still not got the promised 32 levels, but at least I have got a lot more than I had months ago. 

A pleasant surprise the game has  been updated. It’s fun for a quick blast. Hopefully some of my requests from my previous review below will be implemented too. For now a somewhat generous 4 stars seems appropriate. It’s fun in short bursts. 

OLD REVIEW GAVE 2 STARS
I only got the game in April. I hadn’t played it for long and decided to pay for all the extra 32 levels. It isn’t exactly that many, a lot are duplicated, but I was still content for what I paid. More crucially, having not played for a while I found that my IAP has disappeared. I can’t see a way to contact the developers, so hence this short and negative review. I am now left with the base 8 levels and when I tap to purchase, the 32 annoyingly show up briefly, but there is no way to even repurchase. I deleted and restarted a number of times but that hasn’t helped. Before launching, the game has an exclamarjon make in the top left corner. A few other games I’ve got have it too. Not sure if that’s relevant, but I’d not seen it before. A quick check and the others work ok. I will edit this review and make it a lot more positive once I get my complete game back. 

In the future I’d also like to see more levels and options too. Dual guns would be cool, as well as having levels that are not timed, don’t have limited ammo and randomised ones. Some more variety and an option to play favourite levels and skip others would make the game more enjoyable too. An option of varying lengths would be fun. EG, i do love the sheep one, but it’s over way too quickly. I don’t mind the cow abducting one, but different difficulties would make it better too. 

I can’t give 1 star as the demo is good, but a generous two stars for now, as I don’t have what I pad for. Looking forward to a quick reply and fix to the issue. Otherwise, I will have to contact Meta directly for a resolution.

reviews.review_title: Time Crisis fan? You'll enjoy this one!
reviews.review_description:
On rails shooters are nostalgic for me, as a huge Time Crisis II player anytime I see a cabinet out in the wild. There's also something to be said about Zap's art style which is stellar for a quest game. Unique, yet not another game that looks like [insert generic mobile game here]. 

Amazing looking game, much pew pew pew.
i want to lick the cucusnake
Gun has no power.  Plink plink sounds for a gun.  I can't imagine who this game is for.

developer_response.body:
Sorry to hear that you found the gun in the game to lack power.

Different targets require different amounts of bullets and we are still experimenting to find the right difficulty balance for everyone. Based on prior feedback we are making at least "Tofu Trouble" easier in the next update.

Also providing different sounds for the guns to choose from is on our todo list but we are tackling other things first. Sonically there is lot of going on in lot of the maps and having too big of a gun sound can distract from that.

If you have specific spots in the game in mind that felt too hard, or examples of how you'd like the gun sound  like, let us know on our Discord!

reviews.review_description: I tried this on a lark, and was surprised that it was quite enjoyable.  The basic game play is simplistic, but the environments are nice.  I bought their in-game-DLC for $10 just to support them :-).  A wish would be an option to remove quotas ("Victory!") from some levels so you could continue for a higher score.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the idea and buying the game! We are thinking bunch of game modes and maybe one with no quotas would make sense too. Before that we'll probably ship the "speedrun mode" where all the maps end when the quota is reached and the goal is to pass all the maps in the shortest time.

reviews.review_description: Finally a shooter with gorgeous scenery that I can play in my wheelchair! This is amazing
Only played the demo and its seems pretty interesting rail-shooter and beautiful graphics for the quest 2. I am hoping these devs take this game into a "Warioware-Like" Rail-shooter.

And here it is: the perfect game for your buddy and you! The game can be seen as a copy of Point Blank, but benefits from VR and is endless fun for two, filling many evenings!
If your buddy isn't at hand, you can of course shoot alone and have a lot of fun.
After purchase, the scope is enormous and for <8€ you get 50% fun shooters and 50% tough challenges.
We are big fans and say thank you!

developer_response.body: Thanks for the kind words! Means a lot to know there are people out there that find this game and enjoy it. If you have feedback, ideas or just wanna say hi, feel free to drop by at the discord <3

reviews.review_description: Good game, thank you for this experience
